headlines.title_cn: The US government’s Anthropic models ban was never about an AI jailbreak
headlines.title_en: The US government’s Anthropic models ban was never about an AI jailbreak
headlines.summary_cn: The Trump administration's decision that forced Anthropic to pull its latest cybersecurity models could be reactionary, retaliatory, or both, but the message is clear: The AI industry isn't immune from U.S. government interference.
headlines.summary_en: The Trump administration's decision that forced Anthropic to pull its latest cybersecurity models could be reactionary, retaliatory, or both, but the message is clear: The AI industry isn't immune from U.S. government interference.

items.title_en: Ask HN: Has anyone replaced Claude/GPT with a local model for daily coding?
items.summary_cn: Has anyone here fully swapped Claude/GPT for a local model as their main coding tool, not just for side experiments? If so, please share your setup and performance (e.g tok/s)

items.title_cn: Meta’s new ‘AI Mode’ on Facebook pulls from public info across its platforms
items.title_en: Meta’s new ‘AI Mode’ on Facebook pulls from public info across its platforms
items.summary_cn: Meta announced Monday that it's rolling out a wave of new AI features on Facebook, the latest sign of the company's effort to catch up in the AI race and keep users more engaged on the platform.
items.summary_en: Meta announced Monday that it's rolling out a wave of new AI features on Facebook, the latest sign of the company's effort to catch up in the AI race and keep users more engaged on the platform.

items.title_cn: SpaceX is public: Everything you need to know post-IPO
items.title_en: SpaceX is public: Everything you need to know post-IPO
items.summary_cn: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

items.title_cn: Cybersecurity vets protest ‘dangerous’ US government ban on Anthropic’s most powerful models
items.title_en: Cybersecurity vets protest ‘dangerous’ US government ban on Anthropic’s most powerful models
items.summary_cn: A group made up of dozens of cybersecurity experts urged the White House to remove export-control restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable and Mythos models, arguing that the order is going to limit the ability of cybersecurity defenders to secure their software and products.
items.summary_en: A group made up of dozens of cybersecurity experts urged the White House to remove export-control restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable and Mythos models, arguing that the order is going to limit the ability of cybersecurity defenders to secure their software and products.
